title: MGP Negotiated Capabilities
description: Effective capabilities after combining protocol, backend, and runtime declarations.

runtime_capabilities_received.description: Whether the runtime sent a runtime_capabilities object during initialization.

supports_consumable_text.description: Whether consumable_text should be treated as part of the negotiated runtime-facing contract; the field itself remains part of the v0.1.0 response surface.

supports_redaction_info.description: Whether redaction_info is part of the negotiated surface.

supports_mixed_return_modes.description: Whether mixed return_mode handling is negotiated as supported.

supports_partial_failure.description: Whether partial_failure handling is negotiated as supported.

supports_search_explanations.description: Whether search explanations are negotiated as useful to the runtime.

supports_prompt_view.description: Whether the runtime and implementation agree that the prompt-oriented views already present in the protocol are usable end to end.

supports_delete.description: Whether delete semantics are available in the negotiated interaction.

supports_purge.description: Whether purge semantics are available in the negotiated interaction.

supports_async_operations.description: Whether async operations are negotiated as available.

supports_subscriptions.description: Whether subscriptions are negotiated as available.

effective_return_modes.description: Return modes that remain acceptable after negotiation.
